headline: Can Procter & Gamble's Supply Chain Overhaul Withstand Volatility?
summary: PG's Supply Chain 3.0 drives efficiency with AI, automation and digital tools, boosting margins while strengthening resilience amid cost pressures.

headline: Safe Stocks Exist, You're Just Looking In The Wrong Places
summary: When markets get ugly, most investors start asking the same question: where do I hide? That usually leads them to the wrong answer.
